description:
## Problem

The docs site has fragmented coverage of the Ava chat system and agent pipeline:
- docs/dev/ava-chat-system.md covers the frontend component architecture
- docs/server/ava-chat.md covers the server API briefly (92 lines)
- docs/agents/architecture.md covers agent execution but not the Ava delegation flow
- No single page describes the full Ava to tools to DynamicAgentExecutor to ClaudeProvider to SDK pipeline

As Ava becomes the primary entry point to the entire app (with SDK hooks, custom MCP, canUseTool), we need a comprehensive architecture doc that shows the full request flow from the user's chat input through tool execution, agent delegation, and back.

## Solution

1. Update docs/dev/ava-chat-system.md with a new Architecture Pipeline section covering:
   - Full request flow: Chat UI to POST chat endpoint to loadAvaConfig to buildAvaTools to streamText to tool execution to response streaming
   - Ava tool delegation: execute_dynamic_agent to DynamicAgentExecutor to ClaudeProvider to Claude Agent SDK query()
   - SDK integration points: hooks (PostToolUse, Notification, SubagentStop), canUseTool, custom MCP servers
   - AvaConfig fields: model, toolGroups, mcpServers, subagentTrust, sitrepInjection, contextInjection
   - HITL flow: needsApproval to approval-requested to ConfirmationCard to user responds to continuation
   - Prompt chain: AVA_BASE_PROMPT (personas.ts) + ava-prompt.md + CLAUDE.md + sitrep + extension

2. Update docs/server/ava-chat.md to cross-reference the new architecture section and add:
   - SDK hooks configuration
   - Custom MCP server setup
   - Trust model (subagentTrust)
   - Tool progress WebSocket events

3. Add a new docs/agents/ava-delegation.md documenting:
   - How Ava delegates to inner agents via execute_dynamic_agent
   - Role registry and template resolution
   - Progress streaming back to chat UI
   - canUseTool gated approval flow (when enabled)

## Files to modify
- docs/dev/ava-chat-system.md (update with pipeline architecture)
- docs/server/ava-chat.md (update with SDK integration points)
- docs/agents/ava-delegation.md (NEW file for delegation flow)

## Acceptance Criteria
- docs/dev/ava-chat-system.md has a complete architecture pipeline section
- docs/server/ava-chat.md references SDK hooks, MCP servers, and trust model
- docs/agents/ava-delegation.md exists with delegation flow documentation
- All docs follow docs-standard.md conventions (kebab-case, under 800 lines, belongs to a sidebar section)
- No broken cross-references between docs
title: Document Ava architecture and agent pipeline in docs/
